response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong generalist engineer with nearly two decades of production experience, staff-level titles, and directly relevant recent work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year at re:cinq. There is no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or LLM optimization, and Python is absent from his skill set. He could grow into the role, but he does not meet the core required qualifications for a staff-level GenAI delivery position today.
strengths: 18+ years of production software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, with staff-level roles
Current hands-on work on MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
Strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS (CDK) delivery experience, plus a track record of teaching, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: AI-specific experience is roughly one year, far short of the required 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or observability for AI systems
Python, a key language for the role, does not appear on the resume, and enterprise customer-facing technical leadership is only lightly evidenced

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI/GenAI experience vs. 8-year requirement
Missing RAG and vector database expertise
